channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head Extreme Brewing
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Gweedo, I appreciate you and everyone visiting BATV!! Please spread the word and sign up for our email list, all it will do is alert you when a new video or blog is posted, nothing more - I promise, NO spam!!!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Gweedo, I appreciate you and everyone visiting BATV!! Please spread the word and sign up for our email list, all it will do is alert you when a new video or blog is posted, nothing more – I promise, NO spam!!!

item.title: By: Gweedoe
item.dc:creator: Gweedoe
item.description: Great Video man... Just found your stuff today on Twitter...Great videos!
item.content:encoded: Great Video man… Just found your stuff today on Twitter…Great videos!

item.title: By: TheBeerLady
item.dc:creator: TheBeerLady
item.description: Great video! Now if I could just get Dogfish Head here locally..... :(
item.content:encoded: Great video! Now if I could just get Dogfish Head here locally….. 🙁

item.title: By: The Beer Wench
item.dc:creator: The Beer Wench
item.description:
Love this! Dogfish Head is hands down one of my favorite, if not my all time favorite, American craft breweries (this is no secret). I have visited both the brewpub in Rehoboth and the brewery in Milton. Unfortunately, I have yet to meet the brilliant Mr. Caglione. One day!'
Thanks ... and as always, cheers!
item.content:encoded:
Love this! Dogfish Head is hands down one of my favorite, if not my all time favorite, American craft breweries (this is no secret). I have visited both the brewpub in Rehoboth and the brewery in Milton. Unfortunately, I have yet to meet the brilliant Mr. Caglione. One day!’

Thanks … and as always, cheers!

item.title: By: Chipper Dave Butler
item.dc:creator: Chipper Dave Butler
item.description: I love the quality of this video. It looks professional, well edited too. I'd love to see more work like this. In particular if you can spotlight certain brewers like Sam on a regular basis I think you'd do very well.
item.content:encoded: I love the quality of this video. It looks professional, well edited too. I’d love to see more work like this. In particular if you can spotlight certain brewers like Sam on a regular basis I think you’d do very well.

item.title: By: Bruisin' Ales Beer Blog
item.dc:creator: Bruisin' Ales Beer Blog
item.description: [...] produced a little snippet on Dogfish Head Craft Brewery which aired on PBS. Titled “Extreme Brewing,” this covers Sam’s ways and gives a nice overview of the beer [...]
item.content:encoded: […] produced a little snippet on Dogfish Head Craft Brewery which aired on PBS. Titled “Extreme Brewing,” this covers Sam’s ways and gives a nice overview of the beer […]
